topic_definition: Use full text plus Stage 1 handoff. Confirm preference-learning fit, audio applicability, and exclusion of evaluation-only or review articles without adding extra hardening.

questions.question: Does the full text support preference learning, defined as ranking or A/B comparison of two or more audio clips?
If numeric ratings are used, does the full text support that they are converted into rankings or comparative preference signals?
If explicit comparisons are absent, does the full text support that the work contains an RL training loop for an audio model?
Does the full text support that the work is within the audio domain, including multimodal work with audio?
Does the full text show that preferences are used only for evaluation, with no learning component?
Does the full text show that the paper is a survey or review article?
